summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Evolution PRO OS v2.0 new features: ANDREA Pipeline (video processing), LUCA Compliance Dashboard, Native File Manager, and enhanced UI. All backend APIs and frontend integrations working perfectly.
passed_tests: Control Dashboard Endpoint - System status and v2.0 version confirmed
Storage Stats API - Video and document storage statistics working
Compliance Stats API - Document verification metrics working
Compliance Pending API - Pending documents list working
Video Jobs API - Video processing queue working
Files API - File listing and upload validation working
ANDREA Pipeline UI - Partner selector and video queue interface
LUCA Compliance Dashboard - Document stats and verification interface
Partner File Manager - Native storage with upload zones for videos/documents
VALENTINA Chat Integration - AI responses with partner context
Navigation Consistency - All admin and partner navigation working
Mode Switching - Seamless Admin/Partner mode transitions
Responsive Design - UI adapts to tablet viewport
Video Processing Pipeline - Upload, processing, approval workflow UI
Document Verification Flow - Pending to verified status workflow
Storage Statistics Display - Real-time storage usage metrics
